channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 68/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 68/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 66.5%.

item.title: Bloomberg.com: Taxes and Trump Leave UK in a Worse State Than Starmer Found It - Bloomberg.com
item.description: Taxes and Trump Leave UK in a Worse State Than Starmer Found It - Bloomberg.com

item.title: LabourList: Progress looks to post-Starmer phase as battle lines drawn with Burnham
item.description: Progress looks to post-Starmer phase as battle lines drawn with Burnham

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): The ungovernable country? Why Britain keeps losing prime ministers
item.description: The ungovernable country? Why Britain keeps losing prime ministers

item.title: BBC Politics: Labour leadership jostling puts Brexit back under political spotlight
item.description: Labour leadership jostling puts Brexit back under political spotlight

item.title: BBC Politics: Is it harder than ever to be prime minister?
item.description: Is it harder than ever to be prime minister?

item.title: Bluesky · @iandunt.bsky.social: The media empire built by former Hungarian Prime Minister Viktor Orban's government is swiftly unravelling following an election last month ​that abruptly ended his rule... Senior figures at some of the most prominent...
item.description: The media empire built by former Hungarian Prime Minister Viktor Orban's government is swiftly unravelling following an election last month ​that abruptly ended his rule... Senior figures at some of the most prominent...

item.title: BBC Politics: Streeting says he would join leadership race as Burnham vows to 'save' Labour
item.description: Streeting says he would join leadership race as Burnham vows to 'save' Labour

item.title: The Times: Wes Streeting: ‘I’ll be running for Labour leadership’ — as it happened - The Times
item.description: Wes Streeting: ‘I’ll be running for Labour leadership’ — as it happened - The Times

item.title: ITVX: Andy Burnham returns: I will take my fight 'as high as I can go' | ITV News - ITVX
item.description: Andy Burnham returns: I will take my fight 'as high as I can go' | ITV News - ITVX

item.title: Bluesky · @jessicaelgot.bsky.social: Have we ever had a future prime minister explicitly mugging off Andrew Neil this badly?
item.description: Have we ever had a future prime minister explicitly mugging off Andrew Neil this badly?
